params.name: Star of Adam
params.description:
On Jul 20, 2016 AD, the "Star of Adam" was sold for $300 million.
The "Star of Adam" is the largest known blue star sapphire in the world, prized for its unique six-rayed star pattern formed by special minerals on its surface. Weighing over 1,400 carats, this exceptional gemstone is considered an irreplaceable treasure.
